{{Infobox artifact
| name = Greatfather’s tears
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather]]'s tears is a spring located at the summit of the mountain known as the [[Greatfather]], which features a peak shaped like a bottle mouth. This site is characterized by constant storms and serves as the source for the [[Dragon River]]. The spring consists of a potent [[water aura]] that can provide significant benefits to those who use it; consuming small amounts can heal physical ailments and enhance the strength of one's spirit, though larger quantities may induce long-lasting trances. While bathing in the pool can rejuvenate a person's physical appearance and vitality, the water is physically harsh and can feel like a freezing blade. Because of its intense nature, only favored elders from the [[Holy Wind School]] are permitted to bathe in it.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Located at the summit of the mountain known as the [[Greatfather]], [[Greatfather]]’s tears is a spring that forms a pool for favored [[Holy Wind]] elders to bathe in and regenerate their vitality. The water possesses unique restorative properties, as a single handful can mend an aching body and a flagging spirit. [[Consuming]] two handfuls of the liquid induces a three-day cycling trance that increases the potency and density of one's spirit. Additionally, the water can scour the skin like a frozen blade while leaving it youthful and supple.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather’s tears]] is a spring that bubbles at the top of the mountain known as the [[Greatfather]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|One handful of [[Greatfather’s tears]] water restores an aching body and flagging spirit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Two handfuls of [[Greatfather’s tears]] water can induce a three-day cycling trance that imparts density and potency to the spirit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather’s tears]] water can scour skin like a frozen blade but leave it youthful and supple.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather]]’s Tears is a pool at the top of [[Greatfather]] where favored [[Holy Wind]] elders can bathe to regenerate vitality.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
